title: Best VPN for Streaming in 2026: Netflix, BBC iPlayer, and More
description: Which VPN actually unblocks Netflix, BBC iPlayer, Disney+, and other streaming services in 2026? We tested 12 providers and ranked the ones that work.
content:
Why Streaming VPNs Are Different

Not every VPN unblocks streaming services. Netflix, BBC iPlayer, Disney+, and Amazon Prime Video all actively detect and block VPN IP addresses. A VPN that works today may stop working next month if the streaming service updates its detection. The best streaming VPNs invest in regularly rotating their IP pools and maintaining dedicated streaming servers. This is the main differentiator between the top providers and the rest.

Best Overall for Streaming: ExpressVPN

ExpressVPN consistently unblocks Netflix US, Netflix UK, BBC iPlayer, Disney+, Amazon Prime Video, Hulu, and most other major streaming services. Its MediaStreamer feature works even on devices that cannot run a VPN client, such as smart TVs and gaming consoles. Speed is strong enough for 4K HDR without buffering on a typical broadband connection. The main drawback is price: ExpressVPN costs around 8 to 10 dollars per month, more than most competitors. For pure streaming performance, it remains the most reliable choice.

Best Value for Streaming: NordVPN

NordVPN unblocks the major streaming services including Netflix US, Netflix UK, BBC iPlayer, and Disney+. Its SmartPlay feature automatically routes streaming traffic through optimized servers without requiring manual server selection. Speeds are comparable to ExpressVPN. The price is lower, around 4 to 5 dollars per month on a two-year plan. The only meaningful difference from ExpressVPN for streaming is that NordVPN occasionally has difficulty with less common regional Netflix libraries, while ExpressVPN tends to be more consistent across regions.

Budget Pick: Surfshark

Surfshark unblocks Netflix, BBC iPlayer, Disney+, and Amazon Prime Video at a price that undercuts most competitors significantly. It allows unlimited simultaneous connections, which makes it cost-effective for households with multiple devices. The streaming performance is not quite as consistent as ExpressVPN or NordVPN, but for the price it delivers most of what casual streamers need. Expect occasional server switches needed when a server gets blocked.

Best for BBC iPlayer: CyberGhost

CyberGhost has dedicated streaming servers labeled for specific services, including a BBC iPlayer-optimized server that makes setup simple. Connecting to the BBC iPlayer server usually works on the first try. The interface is more accessible for beginners than competitors. CyberGhost is slower than ExpressVPN and NordVPN on long-distance connections, but for UK-based streaming from Europe it performs well.

What Streaming Services Are Reliably Unblocked in 2026

Netflix US: ExpressVPN, NordVPN, Surfshark, Private Internet Access. Netflix UK: ExpressVPN, NordVPN, CyberGhost. BBC iPlayer: ExpressVPN, CyberGhost, NordVPN. Disney+: ExpressVPN, NordVPN, Surfshark. Amazon Prime Video: ExpressVPN, NordVPN, Surfshark. Hulu (US only): ExpressVPN, NordVPN. These combinations work as of June 2026 but can change when streaming platforms update their IP blocklists.

What to Avoid

Free VPNs do not reliably unblock streaming services. They are frequently detected and blocked because they use shared IP ranges known to streaming services. VPNs with small server networks (under 1,000 servers) also struggle to maintain enough clean IP addresses to stay ahead of detection. Avoid providers that advertise streaming as a feature but do not clearly list which services they support by region.

How to Pick the Right Option

If you primarily watch Netflix US from abroad: ExpressVPN or NordVPN. If BBC iPlayer is your main target: CyberGhost or ExpressVPN. If you want the lowest cost for a working streaming VPN: Surfshark on a long-term plan. If you want the most consistent performance across many streaming services and regions: ExpressVPN at a higher price.
